text.title: AI + Spatial Computing Accessibility Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: input → procedure → output spec.

input.description: Target hardware name + OS version + Design.md or interaction spec under audit + Sensor inventory (eye/hand/voice/mesh/face) + Latency budget per modality

trace.step: Confirm target hardware named explicitly; record device, OS, modalities, sensors.
Verify three-tier fallback per surface; flag single-modality dependencies.
Measure p95 latency on target device for each real-time path; reject anything ≥20 ms.
Confirm consent + retention + data-minimisation per stream; document DPIA outcomes.
Run XAUR gap-analysis prompt; cross-check every clause verbatim against W3C source.
Schedule on-device session with at least one user with relevant disability; block release until logged.
